description: Update AgendaView.tsx to display small colored dots or badges next to events that are tagged to spaces. Fetch event-space associations for all visible events. Show space color indicator matching the space's color property. Keep it subtle - small dot or inline label, not overwhelming.
title: Show space badges on tagged events in AgendaView

description: Update src/components/TodayPage.tsx to match Figma Today page (node 22:185). Two-column layout with 48px gap. Left column: 'Agenda' heading (20px semibold #333) + CalendarChip list (gap 10px). Right column: 'Priority Tasks' heading (20px semibold) + TaskList with ProjectHeader groups. Chat Window pinned at bottom. Page padding 32px, section gap 32px. Use new CalendarChip and TodoItem components.
title: Update TodayPage layout to match Figma

description: Create new src/components/Sidebar.tsx matching Figma Sidebar component (node 1:21). Black background (#000), 200px wide, full height. Sections: Top Content (Today with star icon, Review with queue-list icon), Spaces section (header with plus icon, space list with color dots), Bottom Content (Agents with user-group icon, Settings with cog icon). SidebarRow variants: icon-left, color-dot-left (13px rounded square), no-icon, right-icon. Selected state: bg #4F4F4F. Text: 16px IBM Plex Sans Regular, #F2F2F2, line-height 20px. Icons: heroicons-outline 20px. Padding: px-8 py-32. Row padding: px-8 py-6. Remove sidebarRowBase inline styles from App.tsx.
title: Extract Sidebar component from App.tsx

description: Currently heading text in the markdown editor is larger than headings in the rest of the app, causing an unclear hierarchy
title: Fix markdown heading font size

description: Switch mdx editor to my own branch of the project and replace existing uses of the diff display with the new track changes dispay in https://github.com/andrew-craig/mdx-editor
title: Implement track changes editor

description: Replace inline tool definitions with agentTools.ts, inline send/loop with chatEngine.ts, inline prompt with promptFactory.ts. Keep edit lock acquire/release as wrapper around sendChatTurn(). Keep document change detection. Change send shortcut from Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to Enter.
title: Refactor ChatInterface to use shared engine

description: Planning agent (planning_agent.rs) currently uses MCP server tools via stdio transport. Migrate to use same Tauri command-based tool execution as inline agent tools. Remove MCP dependency from planning agent flow. Mark agent-notes-server.ts as deprecated.
title: Migrate planning agent off MCP server

close_reason: Added Figma design tokens to :root in App.css. Legacy aliases preserved for backward compatibility.
description: Replace existing CSS custom properties with design tokens from Figma file kxviBLRi7gCUDtsjzVTqaG. Tokens: Colors (gray-1 #333, gray-2 #4F4F4F, gray-3 #828282, gray-4 #BDBDBD, gray-5 #E0E0E0, gray-6 #F2F2F2, text-primary #333, text-secondary #626262, orange #F2994A, red #EB5757, blue #2F80ED, green #219653). Typography (IBM Plex Sans: heading1 24px/600, heading2 20px/600, heading3 16px/500, body 16px/400, body-small 14px/400). Spacing (page-padding 32px, column-gap 48px, section-gap 32px). Borders (radius-small 4px, radius-medium 6px, radius-large 8px). File: src/App.css
title: Create Figma design tokens in App.css

close_reason: Implemented new Today page design matching Figma mockup
description: Redesign TodayPage, AgendaView, and TodayTaskList components to match the Figma mockup at node 22:185. Key changes: page header, two-column layout with Agenda/Priority Tasks, chat input bar at bottom, tasks grouped by space, simplified agenda cards.
title: Update Today page to match new Figma design

description: Create src/utils/promptFactory.ts with buildSystemPrompt(ctx). Both contexts get: agent prompt + tool documentation. Task context adds: space context markdown, task/space IDs. Today context adds: agenda context (calendar + tasks). Replaces inline prompt construction in ChatInterface.tsx:751-783 and TodayPage.tsx:369-375.
title: Create prompt factory (promptFactory.ts)

description: Replace inline chat logic (~200 lines) with chatEngine.ts sendChatTurn(). Add all agent tools via agentTools.ts with no taskId/spaceId defaults (explicit IDs required). Use promptFactory.ts for system prompt. Keep collapsible panel UX. No edit locks.
title: Refactor TodayPage to use shared chat engine

description: Update EventPopover.tsx to include a 'Tag to Space' action. Show a dropdown/selector listing available spaces (with color dots). Allow tagging/untagging the event to one or more spaces. Show currently tagged spaces as removable chips. Use Primer React components (ActionMenu, ActionList, Label). Load spaces list and current tags on popover open.
title: Add space tagging UI to EventPopover

description: Create new src/components/DocumentChip.tsx matching Figma Document Chip (node 9:146). Variants by doc type: Doc (border rgba(47,128,237,0.4) blue), Sheet (border rgba(33,150,83,0.4) green), Presentation (border rgba(242,153,74,0.4) orange). White bg, rounded 6px, min-h 60px, min-w 200px, max-w 300px, padding 12px, gap 12px. Icon 24px (heroicons document-text/table-cells/presentation-chart-line) + title 16px #333.
title: Create DocumentChip component from Figma

description: Update src/components/SpaceHome.tsx to match Figma SpaceHome (node 1:20). Two columns, 48px gap. Left: 'Up Next' heading + CalendarChips (gap 10px) + TaskList (gap 4px). Right: 'Context' section (heading + markdown text 16px Inter Regular line-height 1.4) + 'Documents' section (heading + DocumentChip flex-wrap grid gap 12px). Remove all Primer React imports (Heading, Button, Text, TextInput).
title: Update SpaceHome layout to match Figma

description: Remove default left/right padding from markdown editors so that the content aligns with the rest of the content in the app
title: Fix markdown editor padding

description: Update src/components/ChatMessageList.tsx to match Figma ChatConversation (node 40:656) and ChatMessage (node 40:573). ChatConversation: bg #F9F9F9, border 1px #828282, rounded-tl/tr 8px, flex column, gap 16px, justify-end, px 8px. States: Fixed (full height), Shortened (200px), Expanded. User messages: bg #E0E0E0, text #626262, padding 8px, rounded 5px, full width. Agent messages: no bg, text #333, padding 8px, rounded 5px, full width. Remove Spinner from Primer React, use CSS animation instead.
title: Restyle ChatMessageList to match Figma

description: Everywhere there is chat, there should be an option for the user to clear the chat history and start again.
title: Enable user to clear chat

description: Update src/components/TaskDetail.tsx to match Figma TaskDetail (node 37:493). Two columns, 48px gap. Left: EditingBar (border #828282, rounded 8px, h 48px, heading selector + B/I/U + list/link icons) + document content. Right: ChatConversation (flex-1, rounded-tl/tr 8px) + ChatWindow at bottom. Page header: back arrow (24px) + task title (24px semibold #333). Padding 32px.
title: Update TaskDetail layout to match Figma

description: Extract core send-and-loop logic from ChatInterface.tsx:706-1060 into src/utils/chatEngine.ts. Encapsulates: message compaction, API call with retry, tool-use loop (tool_use + pause_turn), citation extraction, token usage accumulation, response length limits. Interface: sendChatTurn(config, messages).
title: Extract shared chat engine (chatEngine.ts)

description: Update SpaceHome.tsx to include an 'Upcoming Events' section showing calendar events tagged to this space. Fetch associations for the space, then cross-reference with EventKit events for the upcoming 7 days. Display event title, date/time, and location. Allow untagging from this view. Place section appropriately in the two-column layout (likely in left column above or below task list).
title: Add Upcoming Events section to SpaceHome

description: Create migration 022 adding event_space_associations table with columns: id (PK), space_id (FK to spaces), event_id_external (TEXT, EventKit ID), event_title (TEXT, cached), associated_date (DATE), created_at. Add UNIQUE constraint on (space_id, event_id_external, associated_date). Add ON DELETE CASCADE for space_id FK.
title: Add event_space_associations DB migration

description: Make formatting within markdown editors consistent with other elements in the app. This includes fixing the indenting of bullets, the padding of the box and fitting the heading formatting in with the rest of the app
title: Fix markdown editor formatting

description: Remove Primer React BaseStyles and ThemeProvider wrapper from src/main.tsx. The app should render without any Primer baseline styles. Remove imports of ThemeProvider and BaseStyles from @primer/react.
title: Remove BaseStyles and ThemeProvider from main.tsx

description: Move 9 tool schemas (ChatInterface.tsx:473-626) and executeAgentTool (ChatInterface.tsx:168-470) into src/utils/agentTools.ts. Export getAgentToolSchemas() and createToolExecutor(context). When taskId/spaceId provided (Task context), tools default to current task/space. When omitted (Today context), tools require explicit IDs.
title: Extract tool definitions + executor (agentTools.ts)

description: Fix the indenting of ordered and unordered bullets so that they sit within the text, rather than outside it
title: Fix markdown bullet indents

description: Update src/components/ChatInputBar.tsx to match Figma Chat Window component (node 37:480). White bg, border 1.5px black, rounded 8px, shadow 0px 4px 8px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), padding 12px. Layout: textarea area (top, placeholder #626262 16px) then bottom row (justify-end, gap 27px): agent selector (text + chevron-down 20px) + send button (32px black circle, rounded 6px, paper-airplane icon). Remove all Primer React components.
title: Restyle ChatInputBar to match Figma ChatWindow

description: Enable users to associate calendar events with spaces/projects. Events from macOS EventKit are currently ephemeral with no app-level persistence. This epic adds a mapping table, backend commands, and UI to tag events to spaces and display them in context.
title: Epic: Tag calendar events to spaces

close_reason: Fixed UTC vs local timezone issue in three places: TodayPage.tsx, TodayTaskList.tsx (toISOString→local date components), and calendar.rs (Utc→Local for event times)
description: In the morning, the calendar shown in the today section shows yesterday's events. It resolves in the afternoon (Sydney time) making me think that the query is using the UTC date, rather than the local date
title: Wrong date for today's agenda

description: TodayPage currently uses inline styles (plain black user, gray assistant). Switch to .mcu/.mca classes from App.css. Update ChatConversationPanel component to use shared message classes and animations.
title: Unify message styling across chat contexts

description: Create new src/components/CalendarChip.tsx matching Figma CalendarChip component (node 13:226). White bg, border 1px #BDBDBD, rounded 6px, min-h 60px, padding 12px, gap 12px. Layout: time column (64px wide, 16px #828282) | content column (flex-1, title 16px #333 + attendees 14px #828282, gap 4px) | video button (20px, heroicons video-camera icon, optional). Font: IBM Plex Sans Regular, line-height 18px.
title: Create CalendarChip component from Figma

description: Remove @primer/react and @primer/octicons-react from package.json. Run npm install. Remove sidebarRowBase inline styles from App.tsx. Clean up unused CSS classes in App.css. Verify no Primer imports remain with grep. Run npm run build to confirm no errors.
title: Remove @primer/react dependency and cleanup

description: Update src/components/TodayTaskList.tsx to replace all inline styles with the new TodoItem component. Use ProjectHeader variant for space group headers (semibold 16px #333 with bottom border). Use New variant for 'Add a new task' row. Remove all inline React.CSSProperties styles. Task list gap: 4px between items.
title: Update TodayTaskList to use TodoItem component

description: Create new src/components/TodoItem.tsx matching Figma Todo Item component (node 13:114). Variants: Default (white bg, 32px h, rounded 6px, px-12 py-4, checkbox 12px border #BDBDBD rounded 3px, text 16px #333 ellipsis), Hover (bg change on hover), New (plus icon instead of checkbox, text #626262 'Add a new task'), ProjectHeader (semibold text, underline separator). Gap 8px between checkbox and text.
title: Create TodoItem component from Figma

description: Add to types.ts: EventSpaceAssociation interface { id, space_id, event_id_external, event_title, associated_date, created_at }. Add to api.ts: tagEventToSpace(), untagEventFromSpace(), getEventSpaceTags(), getSpaceEvents() wrapping the new Tauri commands.
title: Add TypeScript API wrappers and types for event tagging

description: Make sure that beads is working in both local and Claude Code Web instances. Make sure that issues sync
title: Setup beads correctly

description: Replace all Primer React components in src/components/PlanCard.tsx (Box, Text, Button, Spinner, ProgressBar) with plain HTML elements + CSS classes. No Figma design exists — style using Figma tokens: text-primary #333, text-secondary #626262, border-radius 6px, IBM Plex Sans font. Create CSS spinner animation to replace Primer Spinner. Create progress bar with CSS.
title: Replace Primer React in PlanCard

description: Implement version history tracking for task notes and other documents so the user can migrate back through them if needed
title: Add document history to notes

description: When the user adds content to the task note, it is not immediately available to the agent. In fact reloading the task also doesn't make the new note content. Update the implementation, so each time a message is sent to the agent, it includes the latest version of the note.
title: Task note agent access

close_reason: Fixed both bugs: agent switcher now switches inline instead of resetting to empty state, and selector button has a visible background
description: There are two bugs with the agent switcher: (1) Its background is transparent, making it hard to read. (2) When the user chooses an agent from the agent switcher, instead of taking the user to the conversation with that agent, they are taken to the full chat window agent selector and have to choose an agent again.
title: Agent switcher bug

description: Remove all Primer React, inline styles, and CSS custom properties. Rebuild UI from Figma design (file kxviBLRi7gCUDtsjzVTqaG). Components without Figma designs get styled with Figma tokens consistently. See plan at .claude/plans/tidy-frolicking-forest.md
title: Replace Base styles with Figma components

description: Primer is deprecating the <Box> element. Remove use of the <Box> element from all pages in the app. Replace with <div>
title: Remove <Box> elements

description: Add backend Tauri commands in lib.rs: (1) tag_event_to_space(space_id, event_id, event_title, event_date) - insert association, (2) untag_event_from_space(space_id, event_id) - delete association, (3) get_event_space_tags(event_id) - return spaces tagged to an event, (4) get_space_events(space_id, start_date, end_date) - return event associations for a space within date range. All commands use the global DB pool pattern from settings.rs.
title: Add Tauri commands for event-space tagging

description: Replace all Primer React components in src/components/EventPopover.tsx (Box, Text, Heading, IconButton, ActionMenu, ActionList, Button) with plain HTML + CSS. No Figma design — style with Figma tokens. Keep functional: time, location, attendees, meeting links, space tagging. Use heroicons for icons (Clock, Location, People, Link, Plus, XCircle).
title: Replace Primer React in EventPopover

description: Auto-updating has been implemented, but there is currently no way for the user to trigger an update (or even check that the app is up to date). At the bottom of the settings page, add an Updates section. This should show the current version of the app, and options to (1) check for updates and (2) install updates.
title: Add option to check for updates

close_reason: Set showToday initial state to true so Today page is the default view on app open
title: Make the today page the default page shown when opening the app

description: There is an issue with the app loading yesterday's calendar in the 'Today's agenda' section of the app, instead of todays. It does not occur when the app is first installed. I cannot tell from testing whether it is because the calendar never reloads after install, or if there is just an issue with the timing of that reload. Start by investigating potential causes and then implement fixes to the logic
title: Fix calendar loading

close_reason: Replaced Primer in AgentSelector, CalendarSettings, UpdateNotification, Settings, AgentsManager, and App.tsx with plain HTML + CSS classes
description: Replace Primer React in: AgentSelector.tsx (Box, Button, Text, Spinner), CalendarSettings.tsx (Heading, Text, Button, Checkbox, Flash), AgentsManager.tsx (PlusIcon, TrashIcon, GearIcon from octicons), Settings.tsx, UpdateNotification.tsx (Button, Text, Spinner, XIcon). Style all with Figma tokens. Use plain HTML elements (button, input, h2, p, span) with CSS classes.
title: Replace Primer React in remaining components

description: Extract shared chat engine, tool registry, and prompt factory. Both contexts get all 9 agent tools. Planning agent migrated off MCP. Unified styling and send shortcut.
title: Unify chat contexts (TaskDetail + TodayPage)

description: The Chief of Staff should be an assistant to the user. It will be the default agent for the today view, and in future may assist the user in coordinating other agents and reviewing their output
title: Create a new Chief of Staff system agent
